title: Molten Yeasty British Cabbage Pancake
description: A rich, comforting vegan-friendly dish perfect for satisfying midnight cravings. The yeasty, molten center is a delightful twist on traditional British pancake cuisine.

ingredients.name: Self-Rising Flour
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use a dedicated gluten-free flour if you're intolerant.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Shortening
ingredients.notes: Use a vegan-friendly shortening or substitute with coconut oil if needed.

ingredients.name: Cabbage Juice
ingredients.notes: You can use store-bought cabbage juice or make your own by blending cooked cabbage in water.

ingredients.name: Vegan Sugar
ingredients.notes: Adjust the sugar amount to your taste.

ingredients.name: Mantecare-Emulsified Soy Milk
ingredients.notes: You can make your own mantecare emulsion by mixing soy milk with tapioca starch and water.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a flaky sea salt for added flavor.

ingredients.name: Furikake
ingredients.notes: A Japanese seasoning blend, use as desired.

instructions: Combine self-rising flour, yeast, sugar, salt, and black pepper in a large mixing bowl.
